tasks.label: Flask: Serve (5000)
args: $inUse = netstat -ano -p tcp | Select-String ':5000\s'; if ($inUse) { Write-Host 'Port 5000 already in use, skip Flask start.'; exit 0 }; $conda = 'C:\Users\hp1\anaconda3\Scripts\conda.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $conda)) { Write-Error "conda.exe not found: $conda"; exit 1 }; $envName = ''; if ($env:YOLO_CONDA_ENV) { $envName = $env:YOLO_CONDA_ENV } elseif (& $conda env list | Select-String '(^|\s)yolo11_web(\s|$)') { $envName = 'yolo11_web' } elseif (& $conda env list | Select-String '(^|\s)yolo11(\s|$)') { $envName = 'yolo11' } elseif (& $conda env list | Select-String '(^|\s)yolov8(\s|$)') { $envName = 'yolov8' }; if (-not $envName) { Write-Error 'No usable conda environment found. Set YOLO_CONDA_ENV first.'; exit 1 }; Write-Host "Using conda env: $envName"; & $conda run -n $envName python main.py

tasks.label: Spring: Run (9999)
args: $inUse = netstat -ano -p tcp | Select-String ':9999\s'; if ($inUse) { Write-Host 'Port 9999 already in use, skip Spring start.'; exit 0 }; .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -DskipTests

tasks.label: Vite: Dev (8888)
args: $inUse = netstat -ano -p tcp | Select-String ':8888\s|:8889\s'; if ($inUse) { Write-Host 'Port 8888/8889 already in use, skip Vite start.'; exit 0 }; npm run dev
